things.name: Sun Yat-sen Mausoleum
things.description: Imposing hilltop mausoleum of the Father of Modern China with 392-step climb

things.name: Nanjing Massacre Memorial
things.description: Sobering memorial to the 300,000 killed by Japanese troops in December 1937

things.name: Ming Xiaoling Mausoleum
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage tomb of the first Ming Emperor in a magnificent sacred way

things.name: Confucius Temple (Fuzimiao)
things.description: Qinhuai River waterfront with a lively night market of Nanjing's famous snacks

things.name: City Wall
things.description: Best-preserved city wall in China at 35km - cycle the top with mountain views

things.name: Presidential Palace (Zongtongfu)
things.description: Former seat of the Chinese republican government with extensive museum

things.name: Purple Mountain Scenic Area
things.description: Cable car to Zijin Mountain with ancient tombs, temples and walking trails

things.name: Zhongshan Botanical Garden
things.description: China's most comprehensive botanical garden on the slopes of Purple Mountain

things.name: Nanjing Museum
things.description: China's second largest museum with imperial bronzes and porcelain

things.name: Nanjing Salted Duck (Yan Shui Ya)
things.description: Nanjing's most famous dish - osmanthus-cured salted duck with aromatic spices
